data.body: CI EVIDENCE for the 'make lint && make typecheck && make test green' AC (codebase-verifiable, evidence lives in CI): Gerrit change #685 patchset 6 has Verified+1 (MAX) from the rebar CI bot — GitHub Actions ran make lint + make typecheck + make test (build/test/lint/typecheck across the py3.11-3.13 matrix + module-size gate) and all passed. Locally: make lint clean, make typecheck clean (313 files), full make test 5863 passed (sole failure is the pre-existing unrelated test_resolve_symbol_confirms_third_party_module yaml-in-venv local artifact, which passes in CI). The degrade-path orchestrator tests (ssh-keygen-unavailable + unwritable-tracker) were added in PS3.
